query: SELECT email, COUNT(*) as duplicate_count, GROUP_CONCAT(id) as user_ids FROM users WHERE email IS NOT NULL GROUP BY email HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute SELECT email, COUNT(*) as duplicate_count, GROUP_CONCAT(id) as user_ids FROM users WHERE email IS NOT NULL GROUP BY email HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
